description.en: OpenAI’s terminal-first coding agent for editing code, running commands, and agentic development loops.
description.zh-TW: OpenAI 的終端優先 coding agent，可編輯程式、執行指令並進行 agent 式開發迴圈。

auth.notes: OpenAI account / API auth.

permissionProfile.notes: Can read and modify local repositories and run commands.

strengths.en: Tight CLI loop for code-centric work.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合 code-centric 工作的 CLI 迴圈。

strengths.en: Natural fit for repo-based engineering tasks.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合 repo 型工程任務。

caveats.en: High local permissions need operator discipline.
caveats.zh-TW: 本地權限高，需要操作紀律。

caveats.en: Mostly optimized for developer workflows.
caveats.zh-TW: 主要仍偏向開發者工作流。

description.zh-TW: Anthropic 的終端 coding agent，適合 repo 工作、重構、debug 與程式生成。

auth.notes: Anthropic account / API auth.

permissionProfile.notes: Can inspect and modify code and run commands locally.

strengths.en: Strong fit for code review and refactor-heavy sessions.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合 code review 與重構密集工作。

strengths.en: Part of Anthropic’s broader MCP-friendly ecosystem.
strengths.zh-TW: 屬於 Anthropic 更大的 MCP 友善生態。

caveats.en: Local command execution still needs careful controls.

description.en: A stateful graph orchestration framework for long-running agents and controllable multi-step workflows.
description.zh-TW: 用於長時間運行 agents 與可控多步驟流程的有狀態 graph 編排框架。

permissionProfile.notes: Framework-level; actual risk depends on attached tools.

strengths.en: Excellent for explicit, inspectable multi-step flows.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合需要明確、可檢查的多步驟流程。

strengths.en: Works well when teams want control rather than magic.
strengths.zh-TW: 適合想要控制權而不是黑盒魔法的團隊。

caveats.en: Adds orchestration complexity.
caveats.zh-TW: 會引入編排複雜度。

caveats.en: Overkill for simple single-call apps.
caveats.zh-TW: 對單次呼叫型 app 可能太重。

summary.en: A stateful graph orchestration framework for long-running agents and controllable multi-step workflows.
summary.zh-TW: 用於長時間運行 agents 與可控多步驟流程的有狀態 graph 編排框架。

description.en: A broad framework for building LLM apps, retrieval pipelines, and agent workflows across providers.
description.zh-TW: 用來打造 LLM app、檢索管線與跨供應商 agent workflow 的廣泛框架。

permissionProfile.notes: Risk depends on the tools and providers connected.

strengths.en: Very broad ecosystem coverage.
strengths.zh-TW: 生態覆蓋非常廣。

strengths.en: Good for teams that need provider abstraction.
strengths.zh-TW: 對需要供應商抽象層的團隊很有用。

caveats.en: The breadth can feel heavy for smaller apps.
caveats.zh-TW: 對小型 app 來說，廣度有時會顯得過重。

caveats.en: Abstractions can obscure provider-specific strengths.
caveats.zh-TW: 抽象層有時會遮蔽供應商原生優勢。

description.en: OpenAI’s provider-native SDK for building agents with tools, handoffs, guardrails, and tracing.
description.zh-TW: OpenAI 原生的 agent SDK，可建立含工具、handoff、guardrail 與 tracing 的 agents。

auth.notes: OpenAI API auth.

permissionProfile.notes: SDK-level risk depends on attached tools and code execution choices.

strengths.en: Very aligned with OpenAI-native agent features.
strengths.zh-TW: 和 OpenAI 原生 agent 功能高度對齊。

strengths.en: Good choice when deep OpenAI integration matters more than neutrality.
strengths.zh-TW: 當深度整合 OpenAI 比中立性更重要時很適合。

caveats.en: Less provider-neutral than LangGraph or LangChain.
caveats.zh-TW: 不像 LangGraph / LangChain 那麼中立。

caveats.en: Best for teams already comfortable with OpenAI’s stack.
caveats.zh-TW: 最適合已熟悉 OpenAI stack 的團隊。

description.en: A workflow automation platform for triggers, integrations, and multi-step AI operations.
description.zh-TW: 可做觸發器、整合與多步驟 AI 營運流程的工作流自動化平台。

auth.notes: Depends on connected services and provider keys.

permissionProfile.notes: Workflow nodes can reach many external systems.

strengths.en: Practical for operational AI workflows that need triggers and approvals.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合需要觸發與審批的營運型 AI 工作流。

strengths.en: Flexible enough for mixed human-and-AI processes.
strengths.zh-TW: 對人機混合流程相當靈活。

caveats.en: Governance matters once workflows touch many systems.
caveats.zh-TW: 當 workflow 接到很多系統後，治理會變重要。

caveats.en: Can become spaghetti without workflow discipline.
caveats.zh-TW: 若缺少流程紀律，容易長成 spaghetti。

summary.en: A workflow automation platform for triggers, integrations, and multi-step AI operations.
summary.zh-TW: 可做觸發器、整合與多步驟 AI 營運流程的工作流自動化平台。

description.en: An integration and automation platform for event-driven workflows, APIs, and AI actions.
description.zh-TW: 用於事件驅動 workflow、API 與 AI actions 的整合自動化平台。

auth.notes: Depends on connected services.

caveats.en: Hosted workflow centralization can raise governance questions.

caveats.en: Less ideal for teams wanting maximum local control.
caveats.zh-TW: 不太適合要求高度本地控制的團隊。

summary.en: An integration and automation platform for event-driven workflows, APIs, and AI actions.

description.en: A modern browser automation framework used for reliable UI scripting, testing, and web interactions.
description.zh-TW: 現代化瀏覽器自動化框架，適合穩定的 UI 腳本、測試與網頁互動。

permissionProfile.notes: Browser automation can access authenticated sessions and web content.

strengths.en: Very dependable browser automation baseline.
strengths.zh-TW: 瀏覽器自動化基線非常可靠。

strengths.en: Widely understood and well documented.
strengths.zh-TW: 普及度高、文件也成熟。

caveats.en: Running browsers at scale still adds operational overhead.
caveats.zh-TW: 大規模跑瀏覽器仍然有營運成本。

caveats.en: Not a hosted browser service on its own.

summary.en: A modern browser automation framework used for reliable UI scripting, testing, and web interactions.
summary.zh-TW: 現代化瀏覽器自動化框架，適合穩定的 UI 腳本、測試與網頁互動。

description.en: Hosted browser infrastructure for running browser automation and web agents in the cloud.
description.zh-TW: 託管式瀏覽器基礎設施，可在雲端執行瀏覽器自動化與 web agents。

permissionProfile.notes: Hosted browser sessions can access external websites and credentials.

strengths.en: Useful for teams moving browser automation into production.

caveats.en: Adds a vendor dependency for browser runtime.
caveats.zh-TW: 會增加瀏覽器 runtime 的供應商依賴。

caveats.en: Sensitive workflows still need session and secret hygiene.
caveats.zh-TW: 敏感流程仍要注意 session 與 secret 管理。

description.en: A web crawling and extraction layer designed to turn sites into clean content for AI pipelines.
description.zh-TW: 專為 AI pipeline 把網站轉成乾淨內容的 web crawling 與 extraction 層。

permissionProfile.notes: Interacts with third-party websites and external content.

strengths.en: Great fit for content ingestion and RAG prep.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合內容擷取與 RAG 前處理。

strengths.en: Canonical crawling API helps reduce custom scraper work.
strengths.zh-TW: 統一的 crawling API 可以減少客製 scraper 工作。

caveats.en: Website variability always creates some extraction edge cases.
caveats.zh-TW: 網站差異永遠會帶來一些擷取 edge case。

caveats.en: Still needs legal and rate-limit awareness.
caveats.zh-TW: 仍要注意法務與 rate limit。

description.zh-TW: 為 LLM 與 agents 設計的搜尋 API，可提供即時網頁結果與研究上下文。

strengths.en: Simple way to add live web context to agents.

strengths.en: Designed for LLM consumption rather than raw search UI.
strengths.zh-TW: 設計重點是給 LLM 消費，而不是傳統搜尋 UI。

caveats.en: Search quality still depends on query strategy.
caveats.zh-TW: 搜尋品質仍取決於 query 策略。

caveats.en: Not a full crawling or browser stack.
caveats.zh-TW: 不是完整 crawling 或 browser stack。

caveats.en: Teams still need their own ranking and evaluation logic.

description.en: OpenAI’s open-source speech recognition model and CLI for local transcription.

description.zh-TW: 可在工作流中注入、讀取與操作憑證的 secrets-management CLI。

auth.notes: Requires 1Password account/session.

permissionProfile.notes: Touches sensitive credentials and secret material.

caveats.en: Account setup and session handling add onboarding steps.

description.en: A vector database and knowledge layer for retrieval, semantic search, and memory-heavy AI systems.
description.zh-TW: 用於檢索、語義搜尋與記憶密集 AI 系統的向量資料庫與知識層。

auth.notes: Varies by deployment mode.

permissionProfile.notes: Stores knowledge and embeddings that may be sensitive.

strengths.en: Good fit for structured knowledge layers.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合作為結構化知識層。

strengths.en: Supports more serious retrieval architectures than a quick demo stack.
strengths.zh-TW: 比起 demo stack，更能支撐正式的檢索架構。

caveats.en: Database operations add maintenance burden.
caveats.zh-TW: 資料庫維運會增加負擔。

caveats.en: Not necessary for every small assistant.

summary.en: A vector database and knowledge layer for retrieval, semantic search, and memory-heavy AI systems.
summary.zh-TW: 用於檢索、語義搜尋與記憶密集 AI 系統的向量資料庫與知識層。

description.en: A memory layer for capturing, storing, and retrieving useful user or agent context over time.
description.zh-TW: 用來長期捕捉、儲存與取回使用者或 agent 上下文的記憶層。

auth.notes: Depends on deployment and storage backend.

permissionProfile.notes: Memory systems can accumulate sensitive long-lived context.

strengths.en: Explicit memory layer helps move beyond stateless chat.
strengths.zh-TW: 明確的記憶層有助於走出 stateless chat。

strengths.en: Useful for personalization and continuity.
strengths.zh-TW: 對個人化與連續性很有幫助。

caveats.en: Memory quality and privacy policy matter as much as tooling.
caveats.zh-TW: 記憶品質與隱私政策和工具本身一樣重要。

caveats.en: Poor memory hygiene can become a trust problem quickly.
caveats.zh-TW: 記憶 hygiene 不好，很快就會變成信任問題。

caveats.en: Database permissions need especially careful review.

caveats.en: Operational complexity is non-trivial.

caveats.en: Needs strong governance before exposing production data.

caveats.zh-TW: 會增加 hosted execution 成本與依賴。

caveats.en: Still requires policy boundaries for what agents may run.
caveats.zh-TW: 仍需要對 agent 可執行內容設邊界。

sourceRefs.label: E2B Sandbox VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: A hosted execution sandbox for giving agents safer code-running environments.
summary.zh-TW: 給 agents 使用、較安全的託管程式執行沙盒。

description.en: Zapier’s action layer for letting AI systems trigger business tools and SaaS workflows.
description.zh-TW: 讓 AI 系統觸發商務工具與 SaaS workflow 的 Zapier action 層。

auth.notes: Depends on connected apps.

permissionProfile.notes: Can act across many connected business apps.

strengths.en: Huge app ecosystem makes it very practical.
strengths.zh-TW: 龐大 app 生態讓它很實用。

strengths.en: Useful bridge from AI assistants into business systems.
strengths.zh-TW: 能把 AI 助理順利接進商務系統。

caveats.en: Action sprawl can become hard to govern.
caveats.zh-TW: action 過多時不容易治理。

caveats.en: Hosted middleware may not fit every security posture.
caveats.zh-TW: 託管中介層未必符合所有安全姿態。

sourceRefs.label: Zapier AI Actions VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: Zapier’s action layer for letting AI systems trigger business tools and SaaS workflows.
summary.zh-TW: 讓 AI 系統觸發商務工具與 SaaS workflow 的 Zapier action 層。

description.en: Notion’s official MCP integration for exposing workspace search, pages, comments, and structured data sources to AI clients.
description.zh-TW: Notion 官方的 MCP 整合，可把 workspace 搜尋、頁面、留言與結構化資料來源暴露給 AI client。

auth.notes: Remote Notion MCP supports OAuth; self-hosted mode can require API tokens.

permissionProfile.notes: Workspace read/write access should be scoped carefully, especially for page edits and comments.

strengths.en: Official Notion stewardship makes the integration direction clear.
strengths.zh-TW: 由 Notion 官方維護，整合方向更清楚。

strengths.en: High-value bridge for teams whose operating context already lives in Notion.
strengths.zh-TW: 對上下文本來就在 Notion 的團隊特別有價值。

caveats.en: Read/write workspace permissions need careful governance.
caveats.zh-TW: workspace 的讀寫權限需要嚴格治理。

caveats.en: The open-source local server is no longer the primary support path versus Notion’s remote MCP.
caveats.zh-TW: 相較於 Notion 的 remote MCP，開源本地 server 已不是主要支援路徑。

sourceRefs.label: Notion MCP VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: Notion’s official MCP integration for exposing workspace search, pages, comments, and structured data sources to AI clients.
summary.zh-TW: Notion 官方的 MCP 整合，可把 workspace 搜尋、頁面、留言與結構化資料來源暴露給 AI client。

description.en: Microsoft’s Playwright MCP server for structured browser automation, navigation, and testing-friendly web interaction.
description.zh-TW: Microsoft 的 Playwright MCP server，可做結構化瀏覽器自動化、導航與偏測試友善的網頁互動。

permissionProfile.notes: Browser automation can click, submit forms, and affect external systems if not sandboxed.

strengths.en: Structured accessibility snapshots are more agent-friendly than screenshot-heavy approaches.
strengths.zh-TW: 結構化 accessibility snapshot 比起大量螢幕截圖更 agent-friendly。

strengths.en: Official Playwright docs and repo make setup and usage easier to verify.
strengths.zh-TW: 有官方 Playwright 文件與 repo，安裝與用途都比較容易驗證。

caveats.en: Real browser control still carries obvious side-effect risk.
caveats.zh-TW: 真實瀏覽器控制仍然有明顯副作用風險。

caveats.en: More useful for interactive web tasks than simple static scraping.
caveats.zh-TW: 比較適合互動式網頁任務，不是單純靜態爬取。

sourceRefs.label: Playwright MCP VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: Microsoft’s Playwright MCP server for structured browser automation, navigation, and testing-friendly web interaction.
summary.zh-TW: Microsoft 的 Playwright MCP server，可做結構化瀏覽器自動化、導航與偏測試友善的網頁互動。

description.en: Docker’s gateway for running and brokering MCP servers in containerized, easier-to-govern environments.
description.zh-TW: Docker 的 gateway，可在容器化且較容易治理的環境中執行並代理 MCP servers。

auth.notes: Auth depends on connected MCP servers and Docker host configuration.

permissionProfile.notes: Safer than ad hoc local servers, but Docker socket and connected server permissions still matter.

strengths.en: Gives teams one place to route and contain multiple MCP servers.
strengths.zh-TW: 讓團隊可以用單一入口路由並管控多個 MCP server。

strengths.en: Container isolation is a meaningful quality signal for production-minded setups.
strengths.zh-TW: 對偏 production 的團隊來說，容器隔離是有意義的品質信號。

caveats.en: Still operationally heavier than a single local MCP server.
caveats.zh-TW: 相較單一在地 MCP server，營運上仍然更重。

caveats.en: Security depends on how carefully Docker host access is constrained.
caveats.zh-TW: 安全性仍取決於 Docker host 權限是否被妥善限制。

sourceRefs.label: Docker MCP Gateway VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: Docker’s gateway for running and brokering MCP servers in containerized, easier-to-govern environments.
summary.zh-TW: Docker 的 gateway，可在容器化且較容易治理的環境中執行並代理 MCP servers。

description.en: Tavily’s production-focused MCP server for web search, extraction, crawl, and map operations inside agent workflows.
description.zh-TW: Tavily 偏 production 的 MCP server，可在 agent workflow 內做網頁搜尋、抽取、crawl 與 map。

auth.notes: Requires Tavily API access.

permissionProfile.notes: Mostly network-bound retrieval risk, but external content quality still needs verification.

strengths.en: Clear search-and-extract focus makes it easier to reason about than generic tool bundles.
strengths.zh-TW: 聚焦搜尋與抽取，比泛用工具包更容易理解與評估。

strengths.en: Official Tavily docs expose concrete client compatibility and package signals.
strengths.zh-TW: 官方 Tavily 文件有明確 client 相容性與套件信號。

caveats.en: External web content remains noisy, regardless of the MCP wrapper.
caveats.zh-TW: 即使包成 MCP，外部網頁內容本身仍然有雜訊。

caveats.en: Requires API spend and good prompting discipline to stay efficient.
caveats.zh-TW: 需要 API 成本與好的 prompting 紀律才能保持效率。

sourceRefs.label: Tavily MCP VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: Tavily’s production-focused MCP server for web search, extraction, crawl, and map operations inside agent workflows.
summary.zh-TW: Tavily 偏 production 的 MCP server，可在 agent workflow 內做網頁搜尋、抽取、crawl 與 map。

description.en: Grafana’s MCP server for querying dashboards, metrics, and incident context from Grafana instances.
description.zh-TW: Grafana 的 MCP server，可從 Grafana instance 查詢 dashboards、metrics 與 incident context。

auth.notes: Requires Grafana URL plus service account or compatible token.

permissionProfile.notes: Observability systems often expose sensitive operational data and should stay tightly scoped.

strengths.en: Useful for teams that want AI access to real operational context instead of screenshots or summaries.
strengths.zh-TW: 對想讓 AI 直接讀取真實營運上下文的團隊很有幫助。

strengths.en: Official Grafana repo plus developer guidance made the integration legible enough to promote.
strengths.zh-TW: 官方 Grafana repo 加上官方開發者指引，讓這項整合清楚到足以 promotion。

caveats.en: Less broadly applicable than general-purpose search or browser tools.
caveats.zh-TW: 不像通用搜尋或瀏覽器工具那麼泛用。

caveats.en: Access to dashboards and incidents can expose sensitive production details.
caveats.zh-TW: dashboard 與 incident 存取可能暴露敏感的 production 細節。

sourceRefs.label: Grafana MCP VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: Grafana’s MCP server for querying dashboards, metrics, and incident context from Grafana instances.
summary.zh-TW: Grafana 的 MCP server，可從 Grafana instance 查詢 dashboards、metrics 與 incident context。

description.en: Sentry’s XcodeBuildMCP gives coding agents build, simulator, testing, and inspection tools for iOS/macOS projects.
description.zh-TW: Sentry 的 XcodeBuildMCP 讓 coding agents 可取得 iOS/macOS 專案的 build、simulator、測試與檢查工具。

permissionProfile.notes: Direct control over local build tooling, simulators, and project files requires strong operator boundaries.

strengths.en: Very concrete capability set for Apple-platform coding agents.
strengths.zh-TW: 對 Apple 平台 coding agents 來說，能力邊界非常具體。

strengths.en: Maintainer-controlled repo and install instructions are explicit enough for live cataloging.
strengths.zh-TW: maintainer 控制的 repo 與安裝說明夠清楚，適合進 live catalog。

caveats.en: Niche compared with broader coding tools.
caveats.zh-TW: 比起更廣泛的 coding 工具，它偏 niche。

caveats.en: Only relevant if your team actually ships iOS or macOS software.
caveats.zh-TW: 只有團隊真的在做 iOS 或 macOS 軟體時才會 relevant。

sourceRefs.label: XcodeBuildMCP VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: Sentry’s XcodeBuildMCP gives coding agents build, simulator, testing, and inspection tools for iOS/macOS projects.
summary.zh-TW: Sentry 的 XcodeBuildMCP 讓 coding agents 可取得 iOS/macOS 專案的 build、simulator、測試與檢查工具。

description.en: HashiCorp’s Terraform MCP server gives agents current registry docs, modules, policies, and workspace context for IaC work.
description.zh-TW: HashiCorp 的 Terraform MCP server 可讓 agents 取得最新 registry 文件、modules、policies 與 workspace context，以支援 IaC 工作。

auth.notes: Can involve Terraform Registry, HCP Terraform, Terraform Enterprise, and local credentials.

permissionProfile.notes: Workspace and infrastructure operations can have direct production impact if write scopes are enabled.

strengths.en: Strong official-docs signal and very clear IaC-specific utility.
strengths.zh-TW: 官方文件信號強，而且 IaC 用途非常清楚。

strengths.en: Helps reduce stale Terraform knowledge by pulling current registry context.
strengths.zh-TW: 能透過最新 registry context 降低 Terraform 知識過時問題。

caveats.en: Still beta and not something to wire into production blindly.
caveats.zh-TW: 仍是 beta，不適合不加思考就接進 production。

caveats.en: High-impact permissions make write access especially sensitive.
caveats.zh-TW: 高影響權限讓寫入能力特別敏感。

sourceRefs.label: Terraform MCP Server VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: HashiCorp’s Terraform MCP server gives agents current registry docs, modules, policies, and workspace context for IaC work.
summary.zh-TW: HashiCorp 的 Terraform MCP server 可讓 agents 取得最新 registry 文件、modules、policies 與 workspace context，以支援 IaC 工作。

description.en: ElevenLabs’ official MCP server exposes text-to-speech, voice cloning, transcription, and audio-generation tools to MCP clients.
description.zh-TW: ElevenLabs 官方 MCP server，可把文字轉語音、聲音複製、轉錄與音訊生成工具暴露給 MCP clients。

auth.notes: Requires ElevenLabs API access and usage credits.

permissionProfile.notes: Mostly API-bound, but generated or cloned voices still raise brand and consent considerations.

strengths.en: Official maintainer signal is strong and the capability surface is easy to understand.
strengths.zh-TW: 官方維護信號強，而且能力面容易理解。

strengths.en: Useful when teams want speech or transcription inside general MCP-based agent workflows.
strengths.zh-TW: 當團隊想把語音或轉錄放進一般 MCP workflow 時很有用。

caveats.en: Usage credits and API cost matter quickly for audio-heavy workflows.
caveats.zh-TW: 音訊密集 workflow 很快就會受到 credits 與 API 成本影響。

caveats.en: Voice cloning features need stronger policy review than ordinary text tools.
caveats.zh-TW: 聲音複製功能比一般文字工具更需要嚴格政策審查。

sourceRefs.label: ElevenLabs MCP VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: ElevenLabs’ official MCP server exposes text-to-speech, voice cloning, transcription, and audio-generation tools to MCP clients.
summary.zh-TW: ElevenLabs 官方 MCP server，可把文字轉語音、聲音複製、轉錄與音訊生成工具暴露給 MCP clients。

items.name: Vercel Skills
items.subCategory: Agent skill installer and discovery CLI

description.en: Vercel’s open skills CLI for discovering, installing, and managing reusable agent skills across multiple coding agents.
description.zh-TW: Vercel 的 open skills CLI，可在多種 coding agents 之間探索、安裝與管理可重用的 agent skills。

permissionProfile.notes: It installs skill packages into agent directories, so source trust still matters.

strengths.en: This is one of the clearest bridges from the emerging agent-skills ecosystem into practical day-to-day use.
strengths.zh-TW: 這是新興 agent-skills 生態進入日常實用場景最清楚的橋樑之一。

strengths.en: Official Vercel docs explicitly document compatibility across many coding agents.
strengths.zh-TW: Vercel 官方文件明確說明了對多種 coding agent 的相容性。

caveats.en: The CLI is only as good as the quality of the skills you install through it.
caveats.zh-TW: CLI 的價值仍取決於你透過它安裝的 skill 品質。

caveats.en: Discovery momentum is strong, but the broader skill ecosystem is still maturing quickly.
caveats.zh-TW: discovery 動能很強，但更廣泛的 skill 生態仍在快速演化。

sourceRefs.label: Vercel Skills VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official product facts.

summary.en: Vercel’s open skills CLI for discovering, installing, and managing reusable agent skills across multiple coding agents.
summary.zh-TW: Vercel 的 open skills CLI，可在多種 coding agents 之間探索、安裝與管理可重用的 agent skills。

description.en: A focused MCP server for reading Discord state, sending messages, managing channels, and handling server-level automation tasks.
description.zh-TW: 一個聚焦的 Discord MCP server，可讀取伺服器狀態、傳送訊息、管理頻道，並處理伺服器層級的自動化任務。

auth.notes: Requires a Discord bot token and MCP client/server configuration.

permissionProfile.notes: This server can read and modify Discord server state, so bot scopes and target guilds need tight control.

strengths.en: Capability boundary is concrete: it is an MCP layer for Discord operations, not a vague “community agent” bundle.
strengths.zh-TW: 能力邊界很具體：它就是 Discord 操作的 MCP 層，不是模糊的「社群 agent」大禮包。

strengths.en: Maintainer repo documents OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Claude Desktop setup paths directly.
strengths.zh-TW: maintainer repo 直接文件化了 OpenClaw、Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 與 Claude Desktop 的接法。

caveats.en: High-permission Discord automations deserve especially careful token scoping and bot-role review.
caveats.zh-TW: 高權限的 Discord 自動化尤其需要審慎控管 token scope 與 bot role。

caveats.en: Community-maintained MCP servers can change quickly, so live claims should stay narrow and operational rather than promotional.
caveats.zh-TW: 社群維護的 MCP server 變動可能很快，因此 live 描述應維持狹窄、偏操作面，而不是宣傳式表述。

sourceRefs.label: Discord MCP VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Validated against the maintainer repo plus independent MCP discovery listings such as mcpindex, LobeHub MCP, and Glama; live entry keeps claims narrow to the documented Discord server automation surface.

summary.en: A focused MCP server for reading Discord state, sending messages, managing channels, and handling server-level automation tasks.
summary.zh-TW: 一個聚焦的 Discord MCP server，可讀取伺服器狀態、傳送訊息、管理頻道，並處理伺服器層級的自動化任務。

description.en: A focused AgentSkills-style workflow for searching X/Twitter, following threads, monitoring accounts, and producing sourced briefings.
description.zh-TW: 一個聚焦的 AgentSkills 風格 workflow，可搜尋 X/Twitter、追蹤 threads、監看帳號並產出有來源的 briefings。

auth.notes: Requires X API bearer token or equivalent configured credentials.

permissionProfile.notes: Mostly retrieval-oriented, but it still reaches an external social feed and can incur API spend.

strengths.en: Narrow scope makes it more legible than generic “do research” repos.
strengths.zh-TW: 範圍夠窄，比泛泛的「做研究」repo 更容易理解。

strengths.en: It showed both maintainer repo clarity and independent discovery listings, which is exactly the kind of staged item worth promoting.
strengths.zh-TW: 它同時有清楚的 maintainer repo 與獨立 discovery listing，正是值得 promotion 的 staged item。

caveats.en: Depends on X API access, pricing, and the quality of a noisy social feed.
caveats.zh-TW: 依賴 X API 權限、定價，以及本身就很吵雜的社群資料流。

caveats.en: Use it as a research signal, not a truth oracle.
caveats.zh-TW: 應把它當成 research signal，而不是 truth oracle。

sourceRefs.label: X Research Skill VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Validated against the maintainer repo plus independent AgentSkills discovery listings; live entry keeps claims narrow and workflow-scoped.

summary.en: A focused AgentSkills-style workflow for searching X/Twitter, following threads, monitoring accounts, and producing sourced briefings.
summary.zh-TW: 一個聚焦的 AgentSkills 風格 workflow，可搜尋 X/Twitter、追蹤 threads、監看帳號並產出有來源的 briefings。
